app.title: My App
app.subtitle: Monorepo template — Hapi.js API + React web app

hero.title: Start from this codebase
hero.description: PostgreSQL, migrations, JWT auth, REST + Swagger, MUI + Redux, tests, Storybook, and i18n (EN/ES). Replace this copy with your product.

features.title: Everything you need
features.createDesc: Set up your first records in minutes: format, dates and rules
features.scheduleDesc: Generate automatic schedules and avoid conflicts
features.resultsDesc: Update results and view the standings table

pricing.title: Plans and pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits you

myTournaments.title: Projects I manage
myTournaments.empty: You don't manage any projects. Create one to get started.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.myTeamsDesc: Manage your team data, players and view statistics.
dashboard.myTournamentsDesc: Manage your projects, schedule and standings.
dashboard.teamsByTournamentDesc: List of teams in each project you manage.
dashboard.noTeamsMatchFilters: No teams or projects match your search or filters.
dashboard.emptyTeams: You have no teams. If an administrator invited you, check your email.
dashboard.noTournamentsMatchFilters: No projects match your search or filters.
dashboard.tournamentTypesCompareIntro: Below is a comparison of project categories and types, and how teams should be formed for each.

tournamentTypeTeams.none: No restrictions. Teams can be formed with any players; no age or category requirements.
tournamentTypeTeams.open: Open. Teams can be formed with any players; no age or category requirements.
tournamentTypeTeams.ages: By age. Organizers define age categories (e.g. birth year ranges). Each player must be assigned to a category; teams must comply with the rules of their category.

dashboard.playersSectionDesc: List of players by project and team. Select a project and optionally a team to view players.
dashboard.playersSelectTournamentFirst: Select a project to view players.

create.title: Create project
create.error: Failed to create project. Please try again.
create.venuesRequiredDesc: If single venue is not selected, teams will be required to add an official playing venue and an alternate one.

standings.title: Standings
standings.empty: No teams yet. Register teams to see the standings.
standings.proOnlyReorder: Only with PRO can you manually reorder the standings table.

cardsByMatch.title: Yellow and red cards by match

detail.title: Project
detail.bgImageErrorMaxSize: Background image must not exceed 1 MB
detail.singleVenueDesc: All play happens at a single venue. Team venues are not required.
detail.suspendConfirm: Suspend this project? It will not appear in the public list.
detail.deleteConfirm: Delete this project? Teams, players and matches will also be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

report.title: Generate PDF report
report.description: Generate a report with match statistics, top scorers, cards and penalties in the selected date range.

matches.title: Match schedule
matches.generateDesc: Generate round-robin schedule. Each team plays against all others.
matches.noMatches: No matches yet. Generate the schedule when you have at least 2 teams.
matches.cannotDeleteRegenerateWithScores: You cannot delete or regenerate the schedule while there are matches with scores and the project has not ended (end date).
matches.addMatchDesc: Create a match manually between two teams.
matches.addMatchProOnly: Only with PRO can you add matches manually.
matches.teamsMustDiffer: Home and away teams must be different
matches.suspendedMatchRequired: Please select the suspended match when adding a rescheduled match
matches.suspendMatchWithResult: Cannot suspend a match with a recorded result
matches.deleteMatchConfirm: Delete this match? {{match}} Only manually added matches (administrative or rescheduled) can be deleted.
matches.validationGoalsMismatch: Total goals must match the number of goals added.
matches.validationCardsMismatch: Card count must match the cards added per team.

register.title: User registration
register.description: Create an account to continue creating your project.
register.recaptchaRequired: You must complete the reCAPTCHA verification
register.name: Name (optional)

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Sign in to create and manage projects.

forgotPassword.title: Recover password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.success: If an account exists for that email, you will receive a link to reset your password. Check your inbox.
forgotPassword.error: Failed to send. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.success: Password updated. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.error: Invalid or expired link. Please request a new one.

profile.title: My profile
profile.name: Name
profile.error: Failed to save. Please try again.
profile.changePasswordDesc: Use "Forgot your password?" on the sign-in screen to reset your password by email.
profile.participatingTournamentsDesc: Projects where you have at least one team registered.
profile.participatingEmpty: You're not in any project yet.

invite.registerDescription: You have been invited to manage the team {{team}} in {{project}}. Create your account to get access.

add.title: Add team
add.name: Team name
add.success: Team created. Invitation sent to owner.
add.noAvailableTeams: No teams available from other projects with the same sport.

createPage.title: Create team
createPage.description: Choose the project the team will participate in and fill in the details. The team will be registered in that project.
createPage.selectTournamentHelp: You can only create teams in projects you manage.
createPage.ageCategoriesInfo: This project has age categories. You can assign each player to a category when registering them.
createPage.noTournaments: You don't manage any projects. Create one first.
createPage.onlyTournamentAdminCanCreate: Only project administrators can register new teams. If an administrator invited you by email, the team was already created with your email.
createPage.invitedUserHelp: If a project administrator invited you by email, check your inbox (and spam) and use the invitation link to register or accept. The email must be the one you use as team owner.
createPage.onlyByInvite: Teams can only be created by a project administrator. If you were invited, use the link in the email to register.
createPage.firstTeamAligned: The first team must meet the selected project's requirements (sport, age categories if applicable).
createPage.success: Team created. Invitation sent to the owner.
createPage.error: Failed to create team. Please try again.

detail.title: Team
detail.birthDateInvalid: Invalid date. Check day, month and year (e.g. February 29 only in leap years).
detail.venuesDesc: Each team must have at least one official venue and one alternate. The official venue is used by default when generating the schedule.
detail.venuesDescSingleVenue: Optional when the project uses a single venue.
detail.noVenues: No venues yet. Add at least one official and one alternate.
detail.venueTypeHelp: Official = home venue used by default. Alternate = backup venue.
detail.addedToOtherTournamentWarning: This team was added to the project "{{name}}". You must adjust the team configuration (age categories, etc.) to meet that project's requirements.
detail.addedToOtherTournamentsWarning: This team was added to other projects with a different format (e.g. age categories). You must adjust the team configuration to meet each project's requirements.
detail.removePlayerConfirm: Unsubscribe this player from the team?
detail.playerRequestPending: Request sent to the project administrator for approval.
detail.categoriesInTournament: Assign each player to an age category for this project.
detail.addPlayerBirthYearOutOfCategory: Birth year must be between {{min}} and {{max}} for category "{{category}}".
detail.addPlayerBirthYearTooOld: Birth year cannot be before {{min}} for category "{{category}}".

rosterPdf.title: Team roster (PDF)
rosterPdf.description: Generate a PDF with project data, team category, and player list (photo, name, ID number, birth date, observations). Preview opens in a new tab.

detail.pendingChangesTooltip: There are player changes pending approval by the project administrator.

playerProfile.title: Player profile
playerProfile.changesRequireApproval: Changes must be approved by the project administrator.
playerProfile.pendingChangesBanner: You have changes pending approval by the project administrator.
playerProfile.resendNotificationSent: Notification sent to the project administrator.
playerProfile.editDisabledPending: You cannot edit while there are changes pending approval.

playerChangeRequests.title: Player change requests
playerChangeRequests.help: Player data is not updated until you approve or reject the request. Below you see the changes the team owner is requesting (current → requested) so you can decide.

messages.title: Messages
messages.copyToEmail: A copy is sent to the recipient's email.
messages.retentionLegend: Messages older than one month will no longer be available in the app. That is why a copy of the messages you send is sent to your email; keep those emails if you need the history.
messages.broadcastPlaceholder: Write the message for the teams...
messages.deleteConversationConfirm: Delete this conversation? All messages will be removed. This cannot be undone.
messages.noBroadcastsYet: You have not sent any messages to teams in this project yet.
messages.deleteBroadcastConfirm: Delete this message sent to teams? It will be removed from history; recipients already received it.
